ksa_text: Knowledge of data mesh principles and federated data ownership models, including the role of data product thinking, domain ownership boundaries, platform infrastructure, and self-service analytics within decentralized data architectures.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-021 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4188 is insufficient to establish relevance to business intelligence development and analytics engineering at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.419, onet=0.413, ddat=0.413) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DQ domain KSA DQ-K-021 excluded at composite 0.4188, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4188 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4188 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DQ (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for BI Developer. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DQ KSA with composite 0.4188 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-K-021 (DQ, composite 0.4188) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4188 with signal across nice=0.419, onet=0.413, ddat=0.413 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DQ-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to BI Developer at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4188, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
